item.title: Prefix
item.author: BYC
item.description: Prefix Sum 前缀和的作⽤：快速查询 一维前缀和 # template # original arr: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] n # prefix sum : [0, 1, 3, 6, 10, 15] n+1 def get_prefix_sum(self, arr): prefix_sum = [0] for i in range(len(arr)): prefix_sum.append(prefix_sum[-1]+arr[i]) return prefix_sum # get the summation of interval [i, j] sum from i to j = prefixSum[j + 1] - prefixSum[i] 二维(矩阵)前缀和 # template def get_prefix_sum(self, matrix): n, m = len(matrix), len(matrix[0]) prefix_sum = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)] for i in range(1, n+1): for j in range(1, m+1): prefix_sum[i][j] = prefix_sum[i-1][j] + prefix_sum[i][j-1] - prefix_sum[i-1][j-1] + matrix[i-1][j-1] return prefix_sum # summation of submatrix # (x1, y1) - (x2, y2) s[x2+1][y2+1] - s[x1][y2+1] - s[x2+1][y1] + s[x1][y1] 194 · Find Words 后缀

item.title: Line Sweep Algorithm
item.author: BYC
item.description:
使用扫描线解决区间问题

扫描线算法：使用一根假想的线在坐标轴上水平或垂直移动像扫描一样经过数据并处理的算法

item.title: Lintcode1507 · Shortest Subarray with Sum at Least K
item.author: BYC
item.description:
Return the length of the shortest, non-empty, contiguous subarray of A with sum at least K.

If there is no non-empty subarray with sum at least K, return -1.

https://www.lintcode.com/problem/1507/

item.title: Lintcode122 · Largest Rectangle in Histogram
item.author: BYC
item.description:
Given n non-negative integers representing the histogram’s bar height where the width of each bar is 1, find the area of largest rectangle in the histogram.

https://www.lintcode.com/problem/122/

item.title: Lintcode362 · Sliding Window Maximum
item.author: BYC
item.description:
https://www.lintcode.com/problem/362/

Given an array of n integer with duplicate number, and a moving window(size k), move the window at each iteration from the start of the array, find the maximum number inside the window at each moving.

item.title: Lintcode285 · Tall Building
item.author: BYC
item.description:
https://www.lintcode.com/problem/285/

At the weekend, Xiao Q and his friends came to the big city for shopping. There are many tall buildings.There are n tall buildings in a row, whose height is indicated by arr. Xiao Q has walked from the first building to the last one. Xiao Q has never seen so many buildings, so he wants to know how many buildings can he see at the location of each building? (When the height of the front building is greater than or equal to the back building, the back building will be blocked)

item.title: Lintcode444
item.author: BYC
item.description:
https://www.lintcode.com/problem/444/description

Please design a data structure which can do the following operations:

  • void addEdge(int a, int b):add an edge between node aa and node bb. It is guaranteed that there isn’t self-loop or multi-edge.
  • bool isValidTree(): Check whether these edges make up a valid tree.

item.title: Lintcode178 · Graph Valid Tree
item.author: BYC
item.description:
https://www.lintcode.com/problem/178/

Given n nodes labeled from 0 to n - 1 and a list of undirected edges (each edge is a pair of nodes), write a function to check whether these edges make up a valid tree.

item.title: Lintcode1869 · Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
item.author: BYC
